case_title: RYAN HOWARD VS. INSTACART C/O APOORVA MEHTA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF WAS ABSENT. THE DEFENDANT(S) ABSENT. THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT TIMELY. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE MAILED ON MARCH 2, 2015. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,155.00 FILED BY HOWARD, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT INSTACART C/O APOORVA MEHTA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED MAR-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT INSTACART C/O APOORVA MEHTA
